title: plectritis macrocera var. ciliosa
intro: Plectritis macrocera var. ciliosa, also known as the Purple Mountain Blazing Star, is a flowering plant native to the western United States. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and promoting wound healing. Plectritis macrocera var. ciliosa can be prepared into teas, infusions, or tinctures for its herbal remedies, and it is also used as a food ingredient in some traditional dishes.
